text: Aaj Nashik mandi mein pyaz ka bhav kya hai?
What is the current wheat price in Karnal mandi today?
Tomato ka rate Kolar market mein kitna chal raha hai?
Will it rain in Ludhiana this week?
What is the temperature forecast for Nagpur tomorrow?
Kal Amritsar mein barish hogi kya?
How can I apply for PM Kisan Samman Nidhi scheme?
Fasal bima yojana ke liye online apply kaise karein?
What is the interest rate on Kisan Credit Card loan?
Cotton crop mein safed makkhi ka ilaj kya hai?
What is the best time to sow sugarcane in Uttar Pradesh?
Rice ki fasal mein kaunsa khaad dalna chahiye?
bhai aaj pyaz ka rate kya chal raha hai lasalgaon mandi me
kal barish hoga ya nahi punjab side plz batao urgent
sir mera cotton ka fasal me safed makhi lag gyi hai kya kare
pm kisan yojna ka paisa is baar kab tak aayega abhi tak nahi mila
wheat rate mandi bhav madhya pradesh today plz tell fast
gehu ki bawai ka sahi time kya hota hai november me kar sakte kya
tomorow tapman kitna rahega mera tamatar ka khet hai nashik me
fasal bima yojna me sugarcane cover hota hai ya nahi koi jankari do
sugarcane ka bhav up me kitna hai is week batana jara
kcc loan ke liye kya document lagta hai bank wale bol rahe pura nahi hai
Onion prices in Nashik have been falling for a week — should I hold my stock a few more days or sell now before the rate drops further?
With heavy rain forecast in Kolhapur next week, will sugarcane mandi rates rise because of expected damage to the standing crop?
Is it worth taking a loan under PM Kisan or waiting for cotton prices in Akola to improve before investing in more inputs?
My tomato crop near Kolar has early blight — will this season's weak monsoon make the disease spread faster if I don't spray now?
Does Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana cover losses if unseasonal hailstorms damage my wheat crop in Ludhiana this March?
Should I sow my rabi wheat in Kanpur this week, or wait a few more days for the temperature to drop as forecast?
Given current soybean rates in Indore mandi, is it a good time to book a warehouse loan against my stored produce?
If the government announces a higher MSP for paddy this year in Punjab, should I still bother applying for crop insurance?
There's a pest outbreak in my cotton field in Guntur — will it help to wait for the predicted rain before spraying pesticide?
Grape prices in Nashik are low right now, but is there a subsidy scheme to help with cold storage costs so I can wait to sell later?
Onion prices in Lasalgaon mandi crashed to Rs 800/quintal last week, should I hold my stock in cold storage or sell now before Nashik APMC arrivals increase further?
What is today's tomato rate at Madanapalle market in Andhra Pradesh, and is it worth transporting my harvest from Kolar given the current fuel costs?
I have 20 quintals of wheat ready in Karnal, Haryana, what is the current MSP procurement rate and mandi price difference this week?
Cotton prices in Adilabad, Telangana dropped after the recent rains damaged quality, what rate am I likely to get for medium staple cotton at the local ginning mill now?
There's heavy cloud cover over Ludhiana today and my wheat is ready for harvest, will it rain in the next 3 days in Punjab so I can plan combine harvester booking?
Monsoon arrived late in Vidarbha this year and I already sowed cotton in Yavatmal 10 days ago, what is the rainfall forecast for the next week to know if I need to irrigate?
I'm growing paddy in Cuttack, Odisha and cyclone warnings are being issued for the Bay of Bengal, will it hit our coast this weekend and how much rain should I expect?
My mango orchard in Ratnagiri had unseasonal rain last week during flowering, what is the temperature and humidity forecast for the coming days so I know if fungal disease risk is rising?

I am a small sugarcane farmer with 2 acres in Muzaffarnagar, UP, and my crop got damaged in last month's floods, which government insurance scheme like PMFBY can I claim compensation under and what documents do I need?

I took a KCC loan last year for my soybean farm in Indore, Madhya Pradesh and now with prices falling I'm struggling to repay, is there any interest subvention or loan waiver scheme I can apply for this season?
